title: 外國傳媒以為中子彈膊頭!

replies.msg:
外國傳媒以為中子彈膊頭!
黑警指鹿為馬!

Police confirmed with NBC News that they had fired live ammunition during the protests. In a statement later posted on Facebook, a police spokeswoman said an 18-year-old man was shot in the shoulder and had been transported to hospital in conscious state.

https://www.nbcnews.com/news/world/hong-kong-protests-threaten-embarrass-china-s-communist-party-anniversary-n1060281

大家 twitter 正視聽
